text:
終わったわね……
なんで東京と思ったけど、ひさびさに
コオリとぶらぶらしたら楽しかったな。

す、すごい……ヒツギちゃんが
元気になった上に、わたしに優しい！
はあん、尊

That should do it, then. I'll be honest,
you bringing us out to Tokyo felt pretty
sketchy, but it was fun getting to hang
out with Kohri.

Oh my gosh, not only is she back to normal,
but now she's even nice to me!
Somebody pinch me!
